category_sources: Official Inform 6 GitHub README describes it as a compiler for interactive fiction games.
source_facts.description says Inform 6 is a design system for interactive fiction.
display_name_sources: Official Inform 6 site and GitHub repository use the name Inform 6.
docs_sources: Official Inform 6 Reference Addendum is hosted on inform-fiction.ifarchive.org.
Official Inform 6 site states it hosts the Inform 6 Designer's Manual, Reference Addendum, and technical manual.
repo_sources: Official Inform 6 site states compiler maintenance moved to GitHub and links the I6 compiler repository.
tags_sources: Official Inform 6 GitHub README describes a compiler for interactive fiction and Z-Machine background.
source_facts.description identifies interactive fiction design use.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools including inform.
